license_gate.blocker: The exact stabilityai/stable-audio-open-1.0 Hugging Face snapshot requires interactive account access and license acceptance; this build has neither authority nor credentials to accept it.
human_steps: Sign in to the PI-controlled Hugging Face account in a browser; do not send credentials or tokens to Codex.

Open https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/stable-audio-open-1.0, read the displayed model terms and Stability AI Community License, complete any required access fields, and explicitly accept only if the PI agrees.
Wait until that same account can access the Files and versions page for stabilityai/stable-audio-open-1.0.
Create a least-privilege read token for that account and keep it outside Git, logs, shell history, chat, and committed configuration.

Using the project proxy wrapper, download the exact repository revision to a new no-clobber persistent directory; do not substitute stabilityai/stable-audio-3-medium or any mirror with a different identity.

Record the resolved 40-hex revision, every downloaded file path/size/SHA-256, the displayed license identifier, and non-secret acceptance metadata in a new access receipt matching provenance/b2/sao_access_receipt.schema.json.
Unset the token, verify the local snapshot and receipt offline, then request a new project decision that changes only the runtime gate; never edit this frozen blocker record in place.

license_identifier: Stability AI Community License (human review required at access time)
